name: Put-up Dilled Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 1 quart canning jars with new rings & lids
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay a hot sterilized canning jar on its side and add half of the green beans.
2. Stand the jar upright, add 2 dill sprigs, 1/2 teaspoon celery seed, 2 garlic cloves, 1 dried chile pepper, and 1/8 teaspoon peppercorns.
3. Repeat with the other jar.
4. In a medium saucepan, bring vinegar, water, and pickling salt to a full rolling boil over high heat.
5. Carefully pour the hot liquid into each jar, dividing it evenly, and wipe away any spills from the jars' lips.
6. Screw on the lids and rings securely.
7. Allow the jars to cool completely at room temperature.
8. Store the pickled beans in a refrigerator for at least 4 weeks before serving.
Note: This recipe does not use the hot water bath method, which reduces the chance of bacterial growth. If you choose to use the hot water bath, the texture and color might be altered.
